001package net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.mode;
002
003import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.button.Button;
004
005public abstract class AdditionalButton implements Button {
006
007    private int slot;
008
009    @Override
010    public final int getSlot() {
011        return slot;
012    }
013
014    public final void setSlot(int slot) {
015        this.slot = slot;
016    }
017
018}
